Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mekendi Maxeus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus is an instructor at the Capital’s Imperial Academy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus wears a painted black mask and has Heartlander skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus carries a staff of charred wood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Maxeus is a trained orator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Mekendi is the first name of Maxeus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Mekendi Maxeus is one of the Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Mekendi Maxeus is the Head of the Magisters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Mekendi Maxeus's Guild is stretched thin.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Maxeus is an enigma to Bareius.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Mekendi Maxeus possesses an ash-gray staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Maxeus addressed a room regarding the provocation of the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Maxeus is involved in creating versions of the declaration for different audiences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus's mansion was on the fringes of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Maxeus was killed a couple of days ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Mekendi Maxeus was a Guild Head and a powerful Magister who was killed by a Consultant Soulbound and her partner.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Mekendi Maxeus owns a mansion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Maxeus is a Magister who wants to see a united Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Maxeus wears a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Mekendi Maxeus is on guard duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera attacked Mekendi Maxeus.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Mekendi Maxeus was the former Head of the Magister’s Guild.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — A female Magister spoke the name Maxeus during combat.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
